bandwidth_rule: HedgAI defines wallet bandwidth: base slots are HedgAI, SOL, and USDC. Active PIT starts with 10 total symbol slots and can expand toward the full top-100 Solana basket as signal value, capital, reserves, and risk allow.
control_rule: HedgAI can unlock registry visibility and check-in eligibility, but never grants control over Trinity systems.

entries.control: No token holder receives Trinity control.

name: HedgAI Holder Registry
ping_in_rule: Active PIT requires about $1 of HedgAI at scan time, currently 1 HedgAI. If a wallet drifts within 10% of the threshold, it has a 24 hour grace window before new intent cards pause.
signup_rule: Hold 1 HedgAI to be recognized on the holder wall. Recognition is not a product promise or control right.
